name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
          /\ states[i] = "eating"

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
            /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
            /\ count' = count + 1
            /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
        \/ /\ count > 0
            /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                /\ tail' = tail
                /\ count' = count - 1
                /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
        \/ /\ count = 0
            /\ head' = head
                /\ tail' = tail
                /\ count' = count
                /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

       /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks

Init == /\ file \in Seq
        /\ chunkSize \in Nat
        /\ maxRetries \in Nat
        /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
        /\ sentChunks \in Seq
        /\ receivedChunks \in Seq
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next == /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ IF Len(file) > Len(sentChunks) THEN
              /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(file, Len(sentChunks), Len(sentChunks)+chunkSize))
              /\ retransmitCount' = 0

              /\ IF retransmitCount < maxRetries THEN
                    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

                    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ IF Len(receivedChunks) > Len(sentChunks) THEN
              /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, SubSeq(file, Len(receivedChunks), Len(receivedChunks)+chunkSize))

              /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
              /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + drift[i]]
              /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i, j \in 1..N:
              /\ i # j
              /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + clocks[j]) \div 2]
              /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        /\ turn' = 1 - turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
